case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS SANCHEZ, ALEX

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ALEX
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
